title: Metagonia calycina
taxonomy: Metagonia calycina belongs to the family Pholcidae, which is a group of cellar spiders. Pholcidae is a family of araneomorph spiders in the infraorder Araneomorphae. This family is part of the order Araneomorphae, which includes a wide range of spiders. Within the Pholcidae family, Metagonia calycina is a species of spider that is native to certain regions. Metagonia calycina's classification is further detailed by its genus and species designations, indicating its unique place within the arachnid classification.
